speaker: RICHARD
text: Come, cousin, canst thou quake and change thy color,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Murder thy breath in middle of a word,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And then again begin, and stop again,

speaker: RICHARD
text: As if thou were distraught and mad with terror?

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Tut, I can counterfeit the deep tragedian,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Speak, and look back, and pry on every side,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Tremble and start at wagging of a straw,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Intending deep suspicion. Ghastly looks

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Are at my service, like enforcèd smiles,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: And both are ready, in their offices,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: At any time to grace my stratagems.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: But what, is Catesby gone?

speaker: RICHARD
text: He is; and see he brings the Mayor along.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Lord Mayor—

speaker: RICHARD
text: Look to the drawbridge there!

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Hark, a drum!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Catesby, o’erlook the walls.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Lord Mayor, the reason we have sent—

speaker: RICHARD
text: Look back! Defend thee! Here are enemies.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: God and our innocence defend and guard us!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Be patient. They are friends, Ratcliffe and Lovell.

speaker: LOVELL
text: Here is the head of that ignoble traitor,

speaker: LOVELL
text: The dangerous and unsuspected Hastings.

speaker: RICHARD
text: So dear I loved the man that I must weep.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I took him for the plainest harmless creature

speaker: RICHARD
text: That breathed upon the Earth a Christian;

speaker: RICHARD
text: Made him my book, wherein my soul recorded

speaker: RICHARD
text: The history of all her secret thoughts.

speaker: RICHARD
text: So smooth he daubed his vice with show of virtue

speaker: RICHARD
text: That, his apparent open guilt omitted—

speaker: RICHARD
text: I mean his conversation with Shore’s wife—

speaker: RICHARD
text: He lived from all attainder of suspects.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Well, well, he was the covert’st sheltered traitor

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: That ever lived.—

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Would you imagine, or almost believe,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Were ’t not that by great preservation

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: We live to tell it, that the subtle traitor

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: This day had plotted, in the council house,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: To murder me and my good lord of Gloucester?

speaker: MAYOR
text: Had he done so?

speaker: RICHARD
text: What, think you we are Turks or infidels?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Or that we would, against the form of law,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Proceed thus rashly in the villain’s death,

speaker: RICHARD
text: But that the extreme peril of the case,

speaker: RICHARD
text: The peace of England, and our persons’ safety

speaker: RICHARD
text: Enforced us to this execution?

speaker: MAYOR
text: Now fair befall you! He deserved his death,

speaker: MAYOR
text: And your good Graces both have well proceeded

speaker: MAYOR
text: To warn false traitors from the like attempts.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: I never looked for better at his hands

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: After he once fell in with Mistress Shore.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Yet had we not determined he should die

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Until your Lordship came to see his end

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: (Which now the loving haste of these our friends,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Something against our meanings, have prevented),

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Because, my lord, I would have had you heard

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: The traitor speak and timorously confess

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: The manner and the purpose of his treasons,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: That you might well have signified the same

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Unto the citizens, who haply may

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Misconster us in him, and wail his death.

speaker: MAYOR
text: But, my good lord, your Graces’ words shall serve

speaker: MAYOR
text: As well as I had seen and heard him speak;

speaker: MAYOR
text: And do not doubt, right noble princes both,

speaker: MAYOR
text: But I’ll acquaint our duteous citizens

speaker: MAYOR
text: With all your just proceedings in this case.

speaker: RICHARD
text: And to that end we wished your Lordship here,

speaker: RICHARD
text: T’ avoid the censures of the carping world.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Which since you come too late of our intent,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Yet witness what you hear we did intend.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: And so, my good Lord Mayor, we bid farewell.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Go after, after, cousin Buckingham.

speaker: RICHARD
text: The Mayor towards Guildhall hies him in all post.

speaker: RICHARD
text: There, at your meetest vantage of the time,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Infer the bastardy of Edward’s children.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Tell them how Edward put to death a citizen

speaker: RICHARD
text: Only for saying he would make his son

speaker: RICHARD
text: Heir to the Crown—meaning indeed his house,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Which, by the sign thereof, was termèd so.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Moreover, urge his hateful luxury

speaker: RICHARD
text: And bestial appetite in change of lust,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Which stretched unto their servants, daughters, wives,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Even where his raging eye or savage heart,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Without control, lusted to make a prey.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Nay, for a need, thus far come near my person:

speaker: RICHARD
text: Tell them when that my mother went with child

speaker: RICHARD
text: Of that insatiate Edward, noble York

speaker: RICHARD
text: My princely father then had wars in France,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And, by true computation of the time,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Found that the issue was not his begot,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Which well appearèd in his lineaments,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Being nothing like the noble duke my father.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Yet touch this sparingly, as ’twere far off,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Because, my lord, you know my mother lives.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Doubt not, my lord. I’ll play the orator

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: As if the golden fee for which I plead

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Were for myself. And so, my lord, adieu.

speaker: RICHARD
text: If you thrive well, bring them to Baynard’s Castle,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Where you shall find me well accompanied

speaker: RICHARD
text: With reverend fathers and well-learnèd bishops.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: I go; and towards three or four o’clock

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Look for the news that the Guildhall affords.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Go, Lovell, with all speed to Doctor Shaa.

speaker: RICHARD
text:
To
                 
                Ratcliffe
                .
                 
              Go thou to Friar Penker. Bid them both

speaker: RICHARD
text: Meet me within this hour at Baynard’s Castle.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Now will I go to take some privy order

speaker: RICHARD
text: To draw the brats of Clarence out of sight,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And to give order that no manner person

speaker: RICHARD
text: Have any time recourse unto the Princes.
